content.speakerText: Hey Alex, got a minute to go over Q2 progress?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，亚历克斯，有空聊聊Q2的进展吗？

options.text: Sure, I've got everything ready for you.
I'm busy right now, can we do it tomorrow?
I don't know anything about Q2.
Can you send me the report first?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Sure, I've got everything ready for you.' 是积极、专业且符合职场礼仪的回应，表明准备就绪。其他选项要么拒绝沟通（opt_2），要么显得不负责任（opt_3），或回避直接回应（opt_4），都不符合开场问候并准备汇报的语境。

content.speakerText: Good morning, Sarah. Do you have a moment to discuss the Q3 plan?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，莎拉。你有空讨论Q3计划吗？

options.text: Sure, I've prepared the slides and data.
I guess so, if you want.
Why are you asking me this?
Let me check my calendar first.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Sure, I've prepared the slides and data.' 表达了积极回应并展示准备充分，符合职场汇报场景。'I guess so...'（opt_2）语气消极，'Why are you asking...'（opt_3）显得对抗，'Let me check my calendar...'（opt_4）虽合理但未直接回应准备状态，不符合‘开场即准备就绪’的核心要求。

content.speakerText: Hi Tom, can we quickly review the project status?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，汤姆，我们能快速回顾一下项目状态吗？

options.text: Absolutely. I've compiled all the key metrics.
I'm not sure if I'm ready.
What do you want to know?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Absolutely. I've compiled all the key metrics.' 语气自信、专业，明确展示准备状态。其他选项或表达犹豫（opt_2）、或推迟对话（opt_3）、或被动反问（opt_4），均不符合职场中主动汇报的积极态度。

content.template: Sure, I've got everything ___ for you.
content.hint: 表达‘准备就绪’的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：get ready for something

content.template: Of course. I've ___ all the data and charts.
content.hint: 汇报前常用动词，表示‘准备好材料’

content.template: Let's ___ in. I've got the key points ready.
content.hint: 口语中表示‘开始深入讨论’的常用短语
content.knowledgePoint: 惯用搭配：dive in（开始深入讨论）

content.speakerText: Hey Alex, got a minute to go over Q2 progress?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，亚历克斯，有空聊聊Q2的进展吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! I've prepared the report and key metrics.
Absolutely — I've compiled all the data and am ready to walk you through it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应并接受讨论请求
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 ready / prepared / compiled 等关键词

content.speakerText: Good morning, Lisa. Do you have a moment to go over the Q3 forecast?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，丽莎。你有空讨论一下Q3预测吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course. I've got the updated numbers ready.
Yes, absolutely — I've prepared the slides and highlighted the main trends.
Sure thing. I've reviewed all the projections and can walk you through the assumptions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并表达准备就绪
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词和时态
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过于正式的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 prepared / updated / reviewed / walkthrough 等职场关键词

content.speakerText: Hi Jordan, can we quickly sync on the Q2 results?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，乔丹，我们能快速同步一下Q2的结果吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! I've pulled all the reports and key insights.
Absolutely — I've organized everything and can start anytime.
Of course. I've summarized the highlights and am ready to discuss.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否立即响应并表明可立即开始
语言准确性：动词使用是否恰当（pull, organize, summarize）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但专业的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 pulled / organized / summarized / ready 等核心词汇
